highlights.text: I wrote yesterday: “The “ultra bull case” for tomorrow would be that ES can recover 5892 and spring directly back to 5915, perhaps dip, then breakout which would target 5930, 5938+”.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the last two days price action where we saw high quality examples of all three of my core setups (The Failed Breakdown, The Regular Breakdown, and the Backtest).

post_title: 7 Green Weeks In A Row For SPX. Pullback Coming? Oct 21 Plan
